results.title: ‎PixyCAD - 3D Solid Modelling App - App Store
results.content:
Powerful yet approachable 3D CAD for iPad and Mac, built for fast modeling, precision, and a truly native experience. PixyCAD is 3D CAD 3D printing enthusiasts, yet simple enough for anyone to pick up and start creating. Most CAD tools are powerful but feel heavy, complex, and slow to iterate. PixyCAD focuses on the essential workflow you actually use to get from idea → solid model → 3D print, with an interface that stays out of your way so you can keep building. Built for a fast maker workflow • Lightning fast, fully on-device PixyCAD is Metal-optimized and runs entirely on your device. Rotate, pan, and edit even detailed models smoothly, without lag, logins, or cloud delays. • Lightweight, polished UI for quick iteration Every control is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. [...] ## Ratings & Reviews

 4.2

  out of 5

  5 Ratings

 ### Fun and capable

  2Critic

  I’ve been pleasantly surprised by this app. It’s easy to get started with, but still has enough depth that it doesn’t feel like a toy. I like that it works well on both Mac and iPad, and overall the experience feels polished. It’s still new and evolving, but already very fun to use.
 ### Unfinished

  maxımum 🦅 [...] control is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. Adjust dimensions, tweak features, and try variations without digging through deep menus. You see what matters: your model, your measurements, your print-ready geometry. • Ready for your 3D printer and other tools Import and export in the formats you actually use: STL and 3MF for slicing and printing, STEP and Parasolid X\_T for collaboration with other CAD tools or sharing with manufacturers. Work where you want Start a concept on iPad with Pencil, refine it on your Mac with a keyboard and mouse, then make final tweaks back on the couch with your iPad. PixyCAD keeps your workflow consistent across devices, so you can design wherever inspiration strikes—at your desk, in the workshop, or on the go. Designed for a gentle learning curve

Powerful yet approachable 3D CAD for iPad and Mac, built for fast modeling, precision, and a truly native experience.
PixyCAD is 3D CAD 3D printing enthusiasts, yet simple enough for anyone to pick up and start creating.
Most CAD tools are powerful but feel heavy, complex, and slow to iterate. PixyCAD focuses on the essential workflow you actually use to get from idea → solid model → 3D print, with an interface that stays out of your way so you can keep building.
Built for a fast maker workflow
• Lightning fast, fully on-device
PixyCAD is Metal-optimized and runs entirely on your device. Rotate, pan, and edit even detailed models smoothly, without lag, logins, or cloud delays.
• Lightweight, polished UI for quick iteration [...] Work where you want
Start a concept on iPad with Pencil, refine it on your Mac with a keyboard and mouse, then make final tweaks back on the couch with your iPad. PixyCAD keeps your workflow consistent across devices, so you can design wherever inspiration strikes—at your desk, in the workshop, or on the go.
Designed for a gentle learning curve
PixyCAD is built to strip away the usual CAD friction, so your first steps in 3D design feel as natural as sketching a doodle in a notebook. Instead of fighting complex panels and hidden options, you focus on shapes, dimensions, and ideas. [...] more

## Ratings & Reviews

## What’s New

# Version History

Create solid with swept features.
Build planes directly from three points.
Multiple bugs to improve stability and make your workflow smoother.

Project cloud sync is now fixed, so your work saves and stays up to date across devices. iPad step import is also fixed, so your step data reliably transfers without interruptions. Plus, this update includes general bug fixes and stability improvements for a smoother experience.

results.title: PixyCAD - Powerful 3D CAD, Beautifully Simple
results.content:
# Powerful 3D CAD, Beautifully Simple

Made for makers and 3D printing enthusiasts, designed for everyone. 3D CAD for macOS and iPadOS that anyone can pick up and start creating with.

Watch Videos

Most CAD tools feel heavy, complex, and slow to iterate. PixyCAD strips away that friction so you can go from idea to solid model to 3D print -whether you're a seasoned maker or designing your very first object.

## Built for a Fast Maker Workflow

Every tool is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. You see what matters: your model.

Apple Pencil–First on iPad

##### Apple Pencil–First on iPad

Sketch your idea with Apple Pencil, then turn it into a precise 3D model -no CAD experience needed.

Lightning Fast, Fully On-Device

##### Lightning Fast, On-Device [...] ##### Lightning Fast, On-Device

Metal-optimized and runs entirely on your device. Rotate, pan, and edit even detailed models smoothly -no lag, logins, or cloud delays.

Work Where You Want

##### Work Where You Want

Start on iPad with Apple Pencil, refine on Mac with keyboard and mouse. Your workflow stays consistent across devices.

Quick Iteration

##### Quick Iteration

Create, Adjust and Tweak. See what matters: your model and your measurements.

Gentle Learning Curve

##### Gentle Learning Curve

Your first steps in 3D design feel as natural as sketching a doodle. Tools that feel approachable on day one and stay powerful as your skills grow.

Print-Ready Formats

##### Print-Ready Formats [...] Print-Ready Formats

##### Print-Ready Formats

Export STL and 3MF for slicing and printing. STEP and Parasolid X\_T for collaboration with other CAD tools or sharing with manufacturers.

Design Faster, Design Smarter,  
Design Happily

Made for makers, designed for everyone. Download PixyCAD and start creating.

Download on the App Store

requires iPadOS 26.0+ or macOS 15.0+ with Apple Silicon

Sign up to stay updated on PixyCAD news
